title: [spec-compliance] SCHC rule versioning + link replay enforcement gaps
description: Convergence (c1a0a246b) and lost-recovery-2 (6dbbae8c5) updated SCHC rule versioning in DIO (MUST per draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md), link replay.c (per-peer epoch/SEQ window), S=1 enforcement for RPL control frames (spec/02-physical-link.md MUST). Multiple small fixes suggest transient non-compliance during integration. Potential desync or security bypass if not uniformly enforced in all SCHC/RPL dispatch paths. Verify against test/vectors/schc*.json, link_frame.json, full interop suite.
